name: Support / Resistance
description: Level reaction model that trades when price is in the outer 8% of the local range, a reversal candle prints, and the window range is wide enough.

trigger: Long when price is in the lower edge of the local range, a bullish reversal candle prints, and the window range is wide enough.
Short when price is in the upper edge of the local range, a bearish reversal candle prints, and the window range is wide enough.

checks.label: Price is in the bottom 8% of the local range
The latest candle qualifies as a bullish reversal
The window range is wider than 0.8%
Price is in the top 8% of the local range
The latest candle qualifies as a bearish reversal
The window range is wider than 0.8%
